name: divi5generate
description: Divi 5 page generator, design reviewer, style tools, importer, and custom module development.

plugins.name: divi5generate
plugins.description: Divi 5 toolkit: SEO-optimised page JSON generator, design/SEO reviewer for any Divi 5 export, brand-guide-to-Global-Variables converter, one-command import into any WordPress site (local or hosted) with draft preview and publish-on-accept, plus Divi 5 plugin/custom-module development and a Theatre.js motion engine.
